info.title: IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPV ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS.

ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS.title: IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPV ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: First bOPV dose from the primary series was administered-115
First IPV dose from the primary series was administered-76
Second bOPV dose from the primary series was administered-115
Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered-76
Third bOPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed-107

ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SPolioBOPVPlusIPVVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
